reviews.review_description: WOw

Excellent casual game to play with a friend. Intuitive and enjoyable. Ideally Devs can add a solo mode where you play against AI and go for high scores. Get this game and tell your friends about it so the community grows. It’s a good time
Its my childhood

This games has so much potential it's better than many games but unfortunately no one was online when I tried only one person and a friend,  I tried to play with my friend but we couldn't it just froze and stopped working, I'm giving 5 stars so other people can try this game and maybe be more actif my experience wasn't that good even though the games are well done

reviews.review_title: Super fun games but not without BUGS
reviews.review_description:
Update:

PLEASE UPDATE THIS APP TO MAKE USE OF THE NEW AVATARS AND FIX THE BUGS.  ACTUALLY, I CAN LIVE WITH THE BUGS, JUST UPDATE THE AVATARS PLEASE AND THANKS. 

OLD- 

Been finding no one online to play with so I got my daughter onboard to try out the games.  The few we played were a blast to say the least.  A lot more polished than the half-cooked games you find on Meta Worlds!  

However, there are bugs where the voice activation feature doesn't work like on the color matching or tower games.  You see a whole bunch of programming code with an error spit out on the table where your controls are.  

Also, our avatars are WRONG.  We have shared family profiles on one account but we have our own avatars.  It works well going on the Meta Worlds but on Mash Me Up,  it's using an old avatar on me that my wife used to have and a totally different and gnarly avatar for my wife when she plays on her own headset.  An old avatar was also being used on my daughter's Quest that she's not currently using, so there is something definitely wrong or not updated here.

Also there are no menu settings or customizations whatsoever.  You basically just appear in a room and wait to play people..
This game used to work and used to be so fun.. I was trying to play tonight and kept hearing a creepy “ silence” then I saw some code in my peripheral.. please make the game what it used to be

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback. We updated the servers and the issue you encountered should be fixed. We hope you come back and try again to play some Mash Me Up.

reviews.review_description: Its the most fun i had with my friend in a long time its a bit glitchie but that makes it also fun
This game is so good, it has good games in it, my personal favourite is the spin the wheel, but it's a great way of communicating with people

developer_response.body: Hey Parky.Man.VR, thank you so much for your review and feedback. We are so happy you enjoy MMup and you have fun with Lucky Wheel! We are already working on a new game that will come in a future update, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Fun quick games to meet people.
reviews.review_description: There are different types of games, some are sporty and others are more intellectual. It's so much fun playing with random people and being able to watch them play in front of you as if they were in the same room. I already want to see what new games they are going to add next :D
Cool bag of games, can't wait for more of them.
I’m not trying to be rude but FIX THE GAME I can’t play anything without my character glitching out and then I reload the game THE SAME THING HAPPENS FIX YOUR STUPID @SS GAME

developer_response.body:
Hey Chary_chary, a new update is live! We improved the avatar system and the issue with the avatar should be fixed. On top of that, you can now play with your friends and we added new games: Lucky Wheel and Black Jack!

If you still have issues with the avatar, could you let us know the following:

Could you please give us more information about the issue (on our discord https://discord.io/mmup) 

Does your character glitch out already in the apartment bedroom (before you press the button) or only once you match up with someone?

What exactly do you mean by glitching out? Any additional information would help us better understand what could have happened.

Did you remove the headset or pause the game with the menu when it happened?

Thank you for your feedback and hopefully, with more information, we can get to the root of the issue.

reviews.review_description: I love the games inside this app!!! That is, when it works. Could be 5 stars if kinks are worked out because when it does work it is so great!!!! Keep working on it, I’ll keep checking back, good luck!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and feedback. Could you give us more details about what didn't work for you in the game? You can also contact us via info@holonautic.com or join our discord server to give us more feedback. Thank you for playing Mash Me Up!

reviews.review_description: Enjoyed my time playing this!
Thank you for creating such a great game!!  An absolutely awesome game (and a must have) to play with friends and family.   This is me and my daughter’s “go to” favorite game.  Very enjoyable!!
This game is very fun I took off a star cuz you can cheat so easy
It seemed promising, It lags a lot, couldn't play a decent game with friends. Other games runs fine, this one doesnt

developer_response.body:
Update: We updated the servers and the issue you encountered should be fixed. We hope you try again to play some Mash Me Up.

Thank you for letting us know. We are aware that there is still a server issue and are currently working on it. We will let you know when the bug is fixed and hope you will try again.

reviews.review_title: Very fun but needs some fixes
reviews.review_description: I love this game! It’s very fun to play with friends but definitely need some fixes, you can cheat very easily and that will ruin the fun, for example, when you play foosball, you can literally grab the ball and put it into the goal, also if you play guess who I am you can take the sticky note off your forehead and read it and then you win, you can also go to someone’s board and see what they are supposed to be drawing. Please fix these bugs! I would give this a 5 star if it didn’t have these bugs.
I was about to play with my friends and then it would not let me play

developer_response.body: Thank you for letting us know. We are sorry you were not able to play with your friends. We investigated and upgraded our server infrastructure over the weekend. Let us know if it works for you now.

reviews.review_description: Verrrrrrerrrrrrrryyyyyt laggy

developer_response.body: Hi chelanmaster, could you let us know more details? Was it laggy all the time or only in specific games? Was everything laggy or only the avatar, the voice, or the physics? Did you play with multiple people and was the lag always the same? The more we know about the issue, the better we can try to find a solution. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: Thanks to this a app I found a cool kid from a different country he’s very very funny
